name: 迷离诡夜 blurred weird night
short_description: I thought it was a comedy, but it turned out to be a tragedy. If there's a chance to go back in time and change something that would cause lifelong regret, would you fight with all you have? (Including story mode and zombie mode)
detailed_description:
Developed by only one person, and it will be updated irregularly! If you have any problems, please join the QQ group 140130929 to solve them.

Introduction to the enhanced version of the game:

Send a box to the boss, but unexpectedly get trapped in a haunted house.

Chased by a big-breasted female ghost and a chainsaw man.

Several beautiful girls are trapped and it's very dangerous.

Do you want to save them or choose to escape alone?

Different choices lead to different results.

Can you have a romance in a horror game by being a hero to save the beauty?

The ending is? You must cure either your lechery or your fear of ghosts.

(Male NPC: Only save the women??? Can't you save us?)

Game features:

  • Hong Kong-style funny horror film style, allowing timid players to enjoy it.

  • A magical adventure with elements of love. Up to 5 beautiful women can develop feelings!!

  • Travel back to the familiar 3D scenes of the 1990s.

  • More than 12 characters with distinct personalities appear, and you can also gain the favor of young ladies.

  • Players' actions can change the development of the plot. A total of 7 endings + one bad ending.

  • Two gameplay methods: story mode without weapons and zombie mode with firearms.

  • Voiced by Bilibili netizens or streamers for free. Thousands of lines of dialogue reveal the mystery for you.

  • With a production time of up to 7 years, the story mode lasts for 7 hours and the zombie mode lasts for 3 hours. There's plenty to enjoy.

  • Developed independently by one person through self-study (poor development team)

 

Known problems and solutions:

  • If operating with the mouse, please unplug the gamepad or Bluetooth transmitter.

  • If the game crashes, increase the system's virtual memory.

  • Solution for not finding SAVE:

Please select "Browse Local Files" on STEAM.

Open the "BlurredWeirdNight_DatadataSavedGame" folder.

Move all the save files to another folder for backup.

Keep only the last numbered save file. (Generally, the save file is 460K in size. If there is a 0K save file, delete it directly.)

For example, if the last save file is "Save68.sav", rename it to "Save0.sav".

(The ".sav" is the file extension. If it's not displayed on some systems, just rename it to "Save0".)

Then you can successfully load the game when you enter the game again.

supported_languages:
English, French, German, Spanish - Spain, Russian, Japanese, Simplified Chinese*, Traditional Chinese*, Portuguese - Portugal
*languages with full audio support
